channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: ANOTR & 54 Ultra’s ‘Talk to You’ Rules WARM Global Dance Radio Chart for Third Week
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: Welcome to this week's music update. We're looking at the latest from the WARM Global Dance Radio chart, where ANOTR's "Talk to You" is still going strong.
[Short music clip: "Talk to You" by ANOTR]
Host: For the third week in a row, this track, featuring 54 Ultra, holds the number one spot with over 900 plays across more than 200 monitored stations worldwide. That's an 8% increase from last week.
[Short music transition]
Host: But "Talk to You" isn't just a radio hit. It's also been featured in nearly 60,000 videos on TikTok and has reached number 5 on Billboard's Hot Dance/Electronic Songs chart. In the latest tracking week, it drew 1.2 million official U.S. streams.
[Short music clip: "New Religion" by Bebe Rexha and Faithless]
Host: Rounding out the top five, we have Bebe Rexha and Faithless' "New Religion" at number two, Calvin Harris and Kasabian's "Release the Pressure" at number three, Milky X Mall Grab's "Just the Way You Are" at number four, and Gordo and Reiner Zonneveld's "Loco Loco" rising to number five.
[Short music transition]
Host: This week's top debut on the chart is Anyma and Joji's "Beautiful" at number 34. And in other news, Anyma also debuts at number 70 with "Bad Angel," featuring LISA.
[Outro music starts playing]
Host: That's all for this week. You can check out the full top 40 of the WARM Global Dance Radio chart on Billboard.com and head over to warmmusic.net for the full 100-position survey. Thanks for tuning in.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
